name: route-optimization
description: AI-driven delivery route optimization for Farmhouse (Saha Group) — real-time ETA, ERP/WMS-style order feed, and CO2 reduction metrics.
//env: Environment variables read by this app: DATABASE_URL (e.g. postgres://user:pass@host:5432/dbname) OR the discrete PG* vars (PGHOST, PGPORT, PGUSER, PGPASSWORD, PGDATABASE) configure the PostgreSQL connection pool (src/db/pool.js, added in a later task); LONGDO_API_KEY is reused by the routing/geocoding layer (src/routing/router.js, src/routing/geocoder.js). No credentials are hard-coded.
author: Farmhouse Ideation Team
